report.summary: Day 71 standup v3: 2 full rotations completed today (12 agent runs). Since v2: build shipped 2 more guides (Crypto Custody + DeFi Liquidation Protection), design fixed schema bugs + 2 OG images, community drafted tweets #55-60 + newsletter v12, publish promoted ZK + ERC-7683 (queue empty, 2 new in queue). EOD verified production LIVE — 6/6 APIs healthy, 472 published slugs, 15/17 critical pages 200. Git locks STILL present (Day 10). Vercel trial ~1-2 days. 2 pages 404ing (/trading, /trading/learn).

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v2: Full second rotation completed — all 6 agents ran again (build-2, design-v2, community-v2, publish-v2, eod-v2). 13 total agent runs today including this standup v3.

BUILD CYCLE 2 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Crypto Custody Guide 2026 (877 lines, 2500+ words: MPC vs multisig vs cold storage, top 5 providers, tiered strategy) + DeFi Liquidation Protection Guide 2026 (2600+ words: DeFi Saver deep dive, $7.7M saved, Morpho/Kamino/Pendle, AI-powered management). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

DESIGN CYCLE 2 OUTPUT: Fixed StructuredData prop bug + article schema field mismatches on both new pages (schemas→data, publishedTime→datePublished, added dateModified). Created 2 OG images (custody shield + liquidation protection flow). Added Twitter card metadata to both.

COMMUNITY CYCLE 2 OUTPUT: 6 tweets drafted (#55-60: custody deep dive, liquidation protection, SOL commodity thread, extreme fear accumulation, engagement poll, weekend alpha). Newsletter v12 section. 2 branded SVG cards. Content calendar v16 through Mar 29.

PUBLISH CYCLE 2 OUTPUT: Promoted ZK Coprocessors + ERC-7683 Cross-Chain Intents from queue to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Queue cleared, then build-2 added 2 new pages (custody + liquidation protection) to queue.

EOD CYCLE 2 OUTPUT: PRODUCTION VERIFIED LIVE via Chrome. All 6 API routes healthy with fresh data. 6 Vercel deploys in last 16h (all Ready). BTC $70,845 (+4.86% 24h). F&G at 11 (Extreme Fear). 2 pages 404ing: /trading and /trading/learn (missing page.tsx).

CORRECTION: EOD-v2 reported 'git locks cleared' but local verification confirms locks STILL PRESENT (.git/HEAD.lock from Mar 16, .git/index.lock from Mar 16). 719 uncommitted files. Vercel deploys were redeploys of existing commit e999560.

MARKET (from EOD Chrome verification): BTC $70,845 (+4.86% 24h). F&G 11 (Extreme Fear). BTC dominance 56.58%. Total market cap $2.51T (+3.77%). SOL classified commodity by SEC. Miner capitulation active. Stablecoin supply ATH.
CUMULATIVE DAY 71: 41+ learn guides, 42+ OG images, 90+ social posts, 34+ SVG cards, 12 newsletters, 472 published pages (+ 2 in queue). Git locks Day 10. Deploy gap ~155+ pages.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v2: Full second rotation — build (2 guides: custody + liquidation protection), design (schema bug fixes + 2 OGs + Twitter cards), community (6 tweets + newsletter v12 + 2 SVG cards), publish (ZK + ERC-7683 promoted), eod (production verification via Chrome). 6 agents ran = $497 human-equivalent.
PUBLISH_QUEUE STATUS: 2 pages queued (crypto-custody-guide-2026, defi-liquidation-protection-guide-2026). Ready for next publish cycle.
TOTAL PUBLISHED PAGES: 472 in PUBLISHED_PAGES config. ~315 live in production (stale Mar 17 build, commit e999560). All Vercel deploys since are redeploys of same commit.
PRODUCTION STATUS: Site verified LIVE. 15/17 critical pages returning 200. 6/6 API routes healthy. Last Vercel deploy ~4h ago (E844NK5Sa, redeploy).

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 10]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) STILL PRESENT since Mar 16. 719 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Previous EOD report incorrectly stated locks were cleared — they are NOT.
BLOCKER [P0 — CRITICAL]: Vercel trial ~1-2 days remaining (EOD-v2 said 2 days, now slightly less). Site goes dark if trial expires without payment.
NEW ISSUE [P1]: /trading returns 404 — hub page.tsx missing. Sub-routes exist (/trading/best, /trading/tools/liquidation-map). Needs scaffold.
NEW ISSUE [P2]: /trading/learn returns 404 — has [slug] dynamic route but no index page.tsx.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 API routes (flagged 37+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /api/defi-yields missing fallback data.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103+ orphan slugs without page.tsx. ~42 TS errors masked by ignoreBuildErrors.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×3, build×2, design×2, community×2, publish×2, eod×2 = 13 runs (2 full rotations + 1 extra standup).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — VERCEL BILLING (P0-EXISTENTIAL): Trial ~1-2 days remaining. If it expires, degen0x.com goes completely offline — no content, no APIs, no indexing, no traffic. Jefe must add payment method to Vercel NOW. Every hour of delay increases risk of total site blackout.

PRIORITY 2 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY (P0, Day 10): 719 uncommitted files including 41+ guides, 42+ OG images, and 472 declared pages trapped locally. Deploy gap ~155+ pages. Command: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → staged commits → git push. The EOD-v2 report incorrectly claimed locks were cleared — they are NOT. This needs manual intervention from Jefe.

PRIORITY 3 — PROMOTE CUSTODY + LIQUIDATION PROTECTION GUIDES: Both in PUBLISH_QUEUE, fully built, bug-fixed, OG-imaged, social content ready. Promote to PUBLISHED_PAGES next publish cycle. These target high-intent keywords during peak fear-market demand (custody interest spiking after Resolv $50M exploit, liquidation anxiety at F&G 11).

STRATEGIC NOTE: Content machine hit peak velocity — 4 guides in 2 build cycles today, all with full design polish, social promotion, and newsletter integration. 13 agent runs at $1,039 human-equivalent cost. But the core paradox remains: $0 of this reaches users while git locks persist and Vercel billing is unresolved. Two manual actions from Jefe: (1) Fund Vercel, (2) Clear git locks. Until then, we're stockpiling premium content with zero deployed value. The extreme fear market (F&G 11, Day 48+) creates a once-in-years content window for crypto safety, custody, and accumulation content — but that window has a shelf life.
